# TeenGrowth

#### A package for wrangling and predicting BMI-related data in adolescent samples

#### by Katherine Schaumberg

## Overview

The `TeenGrowth` package includes functions for:

- Cleaning and processing growth data.

- Calculating Body Mass Index (BMI) and BMI z-scores (BMIZ).

- Forecasting growth metrics.

- Visualizing growth data and weight restoration plans.

## Installation

To install the package using the \`install_github\` function: use the
following code:

    devtools::install.packages("remotes")
    library(remotes)
    install_github("embark-lab/embarktools")
    install_github("embark-lab/TeenGrowth")

## Usage

Here is a brief example of how to use the `TeenGrowth` package:

    # Load the package
    library(TeenGrowth)

    # Example data
    data <- read.csv("path/to/your/data.csv")

    # Clean the data
    cleaned_data <- clean_raw_data(data)

    # Forecast BMI
    bmi_forecast <- forecast_bmi(clean_data)

    # Plot the results of participant # 1
    plot_eBMI(clean_data = cleaned_data, forecast_data = bmi_forecast, px = 1)

For a more detailed outline of how to use the R package, refer to the
[package
vignette](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/articles/Vignette.html).

## Shiny Application

For clinical application, the `TeenGrowth` package includes a [Shiny
application](https://embark-lab.shinyapps.io/teengrowthapp/) to provide
an interactive interface for data input, model selection, and weight
restoration planning.

### Shiny App Structure

The Shiny application is structured into several tabs:

1.  **Data Input**: Upload your data file (CSV or Excel) or use provided
    demo data.

2.  **Data Specification**: Map your data columns to the required
    fields.

3.  **Model Selection**: Select a model to run on your data and view the
    predictions.

4.  **Weight Restoration Planning**: Plan a weight restoration strategy
    based on the predictions.

5.  **Background and FAQ**: Provides additional information and usage
    instructions.

### Example Workflow in the Shiny App

1.  **Data Input**: Upload your data or select demo data.

2.  **Data Specification**: Specify the columns corresponding to
    required fields.

3.  **Model Selection**: Select a model and generate predictions.

4.  **Weight Restoration Planning**: Input relevant parameters and
    visualize the restoration plan.

## Contributing

We welcome contributions from the community. If you have any
suggestions, bug reports, or feature requests, please open an issue or
submit a pull request on GitHub.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Pct_Restore_Plot()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/Pct_Restore_Plot.md)
  : BMI Percentile Restoration Planning Plot
- [`plot_eBMI()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/Plot_eBMI.md)
  : plot_eBMI
- [`Wt_Restore_Plot()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/Wt_Restore_Plot.md)
  : Weight Restoration Planning Plot
- [`add_bmi()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/add_bmi.md)
  : Add BMI to Data Frame
- [`add_bmiz()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/add_bmiz.md)
  : Calculate BMI-Z scores for a dataset.
- [`add_eBMI_to_df()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/add_eBMI_to_df.md)
  : Add eBMI to Data Frame
- [`age_in_days()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/age_in_days.md)
  : Convert age from various units to days.
- [`age_in_months()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/age_in_months.md)
  : Convert age to age in months (rounded).
- [`age_unit()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/age_unit.md)
  : Determine the age unit (days, weeks, months, or years) based on the
  input age.
- [`align_sex_coding()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/align_sex_coding.md)
  : Align Sex Coding
- [`align_sex_coding_in_df()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/align_sex_coding_in_df.md)
  : Align Sex Coding in Data Frame
- [`apply_bmi_lookup()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/apply_bmi_lookup.md)
  : Apply BMI Lookup
- [`bmi_lookup()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/bmi_lookup.md)
  : Lookup BMI
- [`bmi_to_bmiz()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/bmi_to_bmiz.md)
  : Convert BMI to Z-Score
- [`bmiz_lookup()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/bmiz_lookup.md)
  : Lookup BMI Z-Score
- [`bmiz_to_bmi()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/bmiz_to_bmi.md)
  : Convert Z-Score to BMI
- [`bmiz_zscorer()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/bmiz_zscorer.md)
  : Calculate BMI-Z scores for a dataset.
- [`calculate_bmi()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/calculate_bmi.md)
  : Function that calculates BMI (Body Mass Index) based on weight and
  height inputs.
- [`cdcData`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/cdcData.md)
  : CDC Growth Data
- [`clean_and_process()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/clean_and_process.md)
  : Clean and Process Data
- [`clean_data()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/clean_data.md)
  : Clean BMI data This function intakes raw data and creates columns
  for id, agemos, sex, adult height, BMI, and BMIZ. It handles various
  formats for sex and height/weight units, calculates age in months, and
  manages missing columns.
- [`clean_forecast_data()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/clean_forecast_data.md)
  : Clean Forecast Data
- [`cull_demos()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/cull_demos.md)
  : Cull Demographics Data
- [`cutoff_bmi_by_age_data()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/cutoff_bmi_by_age_data.md)
  : Cutoff BMI
- [`cutoffs_by_participant()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/cutoffs_by_participant.md)
  : Generate BMI Cutoffs by Participant
- [`demo`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/demo.md) :
  Demo Data
- [`fit_and_forecast_bmiz()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/fit_and_forecast_bmiz.md)
  : Fit Models and Generate Forecasts for BMIz Data
- [`forecast_bmi()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/forecast_bmi.md)
  : Make Full BMI Data Frame
- [`height_in_cm()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/height_in_cm.md)
  : Function that converts height from various units (inches, meters,
  feet) to centimeters (cm).
- [`m2y()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/m2y.md) :
  m2y
- [`make_bmiz_forecast()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/make_bmiz_forecast.md)
  : Create and Forecast BMIz Data
- [`make_bmiz_tsibble()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/make_bmiz_tsibble.md)
  : Create tsibble for BMIz Data
- [`pct_plot_clean()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/pct_plot_clean.md)
  : Clean Treatment Data for Percentile plotting
- [`pct_to_bmiz()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/pct_to_bmiz.md)
  : Convert Percentile to Z-Score
- [`plot_weight()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/plot_weight.md)
  : Plot Weight Forecast
- [`solve_for_weight()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/solve_for_weight.md)
  : solve for weight
- [`solve_for_weight_metric()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/solve_for_weight_metric.md)
  : solve for weight
- [`tx_plot_clean()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/tx_plot_clean.md)
  : Clean Treatment Data
- [`user_defined_forecast()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/user_defined_forecast.md)
  : Fit User Defined Forecast for BMIz Data
- [`weight_in_kg()`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/weight_in_kg.md)
  : Function that converts weight from pounds (lb) to kilograms (kg).
- [`wgsrData`](https://embark-lab.github.io/TeenGrowth/reference/wgsrData.md)
  : WHO Growth Standards Data
